title: cordia latora
intro: Cordia latora, also known as the Bead Tree or Button Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family that is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia latora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Cordia latora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
